argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const type = "{{ type }}" || 'mentions'; const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const wait = (ms) => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); await wait(1000); const initialState = window.__INITIAL_STATE__; let notifications = []; const extractMessages = (messageList) => { if (!Array.isArray(messageList)) return []; return messageList.map(item => ({ user: item?.user_info?.nickname || '', action: item?.title || '', content: (item?.comment_info?.content || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(), note: (item?.item_info?.content || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(), time: item?.time || '' })); }; if (initialState?.['/you/']?.data?.message_list) { notifications = extractMessages(initialState['/you/'].data.message_list); } if (!notifications.length && initialState?.notification?.data?.message_list) { notifications = extractMessages(initialState.notification.data.message_list); } if (!notifications.length) { const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.notification-item, .message-item, .msg-item'); sections.forEach(section => { const userEl = section.querySelector('.user-name, .nickname, .user-info .name'); const actionEl = section.querySelector('.action, .title, .msg-title'); const contentEl = section.querySelector('.content, .msg-content, .comment-content'); const noteEl = section.querySelector('.note-content, .item-content'); const timeEl = section.querySelector('.time, .date'); notifications.push({ user: (userEl?.textContent || '').trim(), action: (actionEl?.textContent || '').trim(), content: (contentEl?.textContent || '').trim(), note: (noteEl?.textContent || '').trim(), time: (timeEl?.textContent || '').trim() }); }); } return { notifications, type, limit }; }

async (intermediate) => { const limit = intermediate.limit || 20; const notifications = intermediate.notifications || []; if (!notifications.length) return []; return notifications.slice(0, limit).map((n, i) => ({ rank: i + 1, ...n })); }

variables.name: type
variables.help: Notification type: mentions, likes, or connections
